RADIO/TV:

2. TRADITIONAL DIRECT MARKETING APPROACH
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 31 of 38 --

BROADCAST STRATEGY:
1. “Brokered Radio” is PAY-TO-PLAY
2. Weekly Half-Hour to Hour Program
3. Will be Required to Submit a Demo or Make an Application
4. Pre-recorded or Live
5. You’ll Get Some Commercial Slots With Your Broadcast Package
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
